local_sources: Validated file-preparation outputs and evidence for identity, ownership, engagement, privacy, AI applicability, AML and monitoring

codex_context.purpose: Assess missing evidence and prepare decisions reserved to the commercialista
codex_context.content: Validated case records, ownership and mandate facts, privacy and AML evidence, provenance anchors and unresolved decisions
codex_context.minimum_necessary: Use validated structured records and targeted evidence anchors; avoid reopening complete source folders unless a material ambiguity requires it

codex_context.purpose: Prepare the professional-review dossier and monitoring plan
codex_context.content: Case-specific decision records, gaps, calculations and selected evidence excerpts
codex_context.minimum_necessary: Include only facts and excerpts supporting the proposed review item

residual_risks.risk: The professional setup necessarily includes identity, ownership, mandate, privacy and AML facts about identifiable people
residual_risks.mitigation: Use owner-only outputs, validated structured records, targeted evidence and explicit professional review gates

commercialista_notice.message_it: La preparazione tecnica dei documenti resta locale. Per predisporre identità, incarico, privacy e AML, Codex esamina i dati strutturati e le evidenze pertinenti del cliente; il fascicolo completo non viene incluso automaticamente.
commercialista_notice.message_en: Technical document preparation remains local. To prepare identity, engagement, privacy and AML review, Codex examines the client's structured facts and relevant evidence; the complete file is not included automatically.

limitations: The exact personal data needed depends on the relationship and professional decisions under review
This is a design-time data-flow review, not a GDPR legal determination
